design_philosophy: Grounded neutrals and earthy tones with an approachable, high-end editorial layout. Emphasizes generous white space, large striking photography, and an effortless progressive-disclosure booking flow.

background.description: Warm Sand / Bone White - Used for main page backgrounds to feel organic and warm.

surface.description: Soft Stone - Used for cards, secondary sections, and input backgrounds.

primary.description: Deep Olive / Sage - Primary CTA, strong accents, active states.

secondary.description: Warm Terracotta / Clay - Subtle highlights, secondary buttons, tags.

primary_font.usage: Headings (H1-H4), massive typographic impact, hero text.
primary_font.styles: tracking-tight, leading-none to leading-tight, elegant weights (Regular or SemiBold).

secondary_font.usage: Body text, UI elements, overlines, navigation, buttons.
secondary_font.styles: Clean, highly readable, tracking-normal. Overlines use uppercase and tracking-[0.2em].

hero.description: Upscale salon interior, warm lighting. Main hero visual.

services.description: Beautiful curly hair styling. Use for Styling / Cut service.
Blonde hair color. Use for Coloring service.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous Spacing (p-12, p-16, p-24). Allow content to breathe.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: For services and gallery, use an asymmetric bento grid. E.g., grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8). Elements span unequal columns (col-span-8, col-span-4).
layout_and_spacing.image_masks: Avoid sharp rectangles for gallery photos. Use rounded-2xl or arched frames (rounded-t-full) to enhance the organic feel.

header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80 border-b border-[#D5CFC4]/50
header.elements: Logo (Cormorant Garamond text), Navigation Links (Outfit), Primary 'Book Now' CTA.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#4A5D4E] text-white px-8 py-3 hover:bg-[#2C332E] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full border border-[#D5CFC4] text-[#2C332E] hover:border-[#4A5D4E] px-8 py-3 transition-colors duration-300

marquee.description: Use a marquee to display prestige brands used (e.g., Oribe, Davines, Olaplex) or featured text. Pale surface background, widely spaced text, slow drift.

booking_flow.steps: 1. Select Service -> 2. Choose Stylist -> 3. Date & Time -> 4. Details
booking_flow.ui_pattern: Do not show a massive form. Show one step at a time with smooth transitions. Use user-centric calendar pickers and time slots.
booking_flow.components: Shadcn Form, Calendar, Select. Overridden to use organic border-radius and warm surface colors.

admin_dashboard.ui_pattern: Flat solid surfaces, subtle 1px border. No glassmorphism. Focus on tabular data (Bookings, Times, Stylists) with high readability.

animations.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling if possible, or smooth-scroll CSS.
animations.interactions: Hover states on services/gallery should have a subtle image scale (scale-105) inside a hidden overflow container, taking 500ms to 700ms (ease-out).
animations.page_load: Staggered fade-up for hero elements and typography.

testing_guidelines.attributes: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid='hero-book-cta', data-testid='booking-service-select'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Set up Tailwind configuration mapping the colors defined above.
Build a unified landing page that seamlessly links to a dedicated /book route for the progressive booking flow.
Ensure the hero section uses a soft, warm overlay on the image so text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards.
Use Shadcn UI components but strip any default 'Vercel-look'. Re-style borders to use the #D5CFC4 color and add slight rounding (rounded-xl or full for buttons).
The booking flow must be visually separated into steps (using state) rather than one long scrollable form.
Implement a simple /admin dashboard mimicking a real backend view with a table of mock appointments.
Do NOT use placeholder images; rely strictly on the Unsplash URLs provided in this file.
